principle: Seed onboarding and profile completion at a non-zero value and show empty placeholder slots — users complete partially-done tasks at far higher rates than tasks not yet started
explanation: X.ux|zeigarnik_onboarding: 0%_start -> user_feels_task_not_begun -> low_completion; seed_25%_after_name_entry -> cognitive_tension -> higher_completion; show_empty_placeholder_slots_for_missing_content; NO:profile_0%_on_first_login NO:blank_empty_state_without_slots; eg: "profile_0%_complete_name_only" >> "profile_25%_complete + 6_empty_badge_slots_visible"

principle: Show a resume-incomplete-task banner on return visits to abandoned flows — users recall unfinished tasks 90% better than completed ones
explanation: X.ux|zeigarnik_resume: abandoned_flow -> user_subconsciously_remembers; on_return: show_resume_banner + last_completed_step + direct_link_to_continue; NOT generic_homepage_CTA NOT start_over_silently; applies_to: checkout + onboarding + multi_step_form + quiz; eg: "homepage_no_mention_of_abandoned_cart" >> "banner: 'Your order is waiting — 2 items, last step: payment'"
